title: BNG Blaster Configuration
description: JSON schema for BNG Blaster configuration files

interfaces.description: Interface configuration (network, access, a10nsp, links, lag)

tx-threads.description: Number of TX threads per interface link

rx-threads.description: Number of RX threads per interface link

capture-include-streams.description: Include traffic streams in the capture

mac-modifier.description: Third byte of access session MAC address (0-255)

start-rate.description: Setup request rate in sessions per second

stop-rate.description: Teardown request rate in sessions per second

start-delay.description: Wait N seconds after all interfaces are resolved before starting sessions

monkey-autostart.description: Start monkey testing automatically if enabled

arp-timeout.description: Initial ARP timeout/retry interval in seconds

arp-interval.description: Periodic ARP interval in seconds (0 means disabled)

vlan-priority.description: VLAN PBIT for all IPoE control traffic.

session-time.description: Max PPPoE session time in seconds (0 = infinity)

discovery-timeout.description: PPPoE discovery (PADI and PADR) timeout in seconds

discovery-retry.description: PPPoE discovery (PADI and PADR) max retry

vlan-priority.description: VLAN PBIT for all PPPoE/PPP control traffic

conf-request-timeout.description: LCP configuration request timeout in seconds

keepalive-interval.description: LCP echo request interval in seconds (0 = disabled)

keepalive-retry.description: PPP LCP echo request max retry

start-delay.description: PPP LCP initial request delay in milliseconds

request-ip.description: Include IP-Address with 0.0.0.0 in initial IPCP request

conf-request-timeout.description: IPCP configuration request timeout in seconds
IP6CP configuration request timeout in seconds

keep-address.description: Emulates init-reboot on stop if enabled together with release-retry set to zero (disabled)

tos.description: IPv4 TOS for all DHCP control traffic

vlan-priority.description: VLAN PBIT for all DHCP control traffic

ia-separate.description: Seperate requests for IA_NA and IA_PD

vlan-priority.description: VLAN PBIT for all DHCPv6 control traffic

autostart.description: Automatically join after the session is established

start-delay.description: Delay between session established and initial IGMP join in seconds

combined-leave-join.description: Combine leave and join records in single IGMPv3 report

zapping-interval.description: IGMP channel zapping interval in seconds (0 = disabled)

zapping-count.description: Number of channel changes before starting view duration (0 = disabled)

zapping-wait.description: Wait for multicast traffic before zapping to next channel

max-join-delay.description: Maximum join delay in milliseconds (0 = disabled)

send-multicast-traffic.description: Generate multicast traffic on network interface

rate-up.description: Actual Data Rate Upstream (0 = not sent)

rate-down.description: Actual Data Rate Downstream (0 = not sent)

act-up.description: Actual Data Rate Upstream (overwritten by rate-up)

act-down.description: Actual Data Rate Downstream (overwritten by rate-down)

min-up-low.description: Min Data Rate Upstream in low power state

min-down-low.description: Min Data Rate Downstream in low power state

pon-tree-max-up.description: PON Tree Maximum Data Rate Upstream

pon-tree-max-down.description: PON Tree Maximum Data Rate Downstream

ipv4-label.description: Downstream IPv4 traffic MPLS label (0 = unlabeled)

ipv6-label.description: Downstream IPv6 traffic MPLS label (0 = unlabeled)

stop-verified.description: Automatically stop traffic streams if verified

stream-burst-ms.description: Maximum burst size per stream in milliseconds

reassemble-fragments.description: Enable reassembly of fragmented IPv4 stream packets

data-control-priority.description: Set priority bit for non-IP data packets

data-length.description: Set length bit for all data packets

data-offset.description: Set offset bit with zero for all data packets

data-control-tos.description: L2TP tunnel TOS for non-IP data packets

lcp-padding.description: Add fixed padding to LCP packets from LNS

group-id.description: L2TP client group identifier, matched against l2tp-client-group-id in access interfaces

network-interface.description: Network interface used for L2TP tunnel

client-address.description: L2TP client source address (defaults to network interface address)

max-retry.description: Maximum number of tunnel setup retries

data-control-priority.description: Set priority bit for non-IP data packets

data-length.description: Set length bit for all data packets

data-offset.description: Set offset bit with zero for all data packets

data-control-tos.description: L2TP tunnel TOS for non-IP data packets

lcp-padding.description: Add fixed padding to LCP packets

gateway-mac.description: Optional gateway MAC address (resolved via ARP/ND by default)

gateway-resolve-wait.description: Wait until gateways are resolved before starting sessions

cfm-ma-name.description: EOAM CFM maintenance association short name

cfm-cc-seq.description: Enable EOAM CFM CC sequence numbers

a10nsp-tx-label.description: Transport label for A10NSP services in downstream direction

network-interface.description: Select corresponding network interface for sessions

a10nsp-interface.description: Select corresponding A10NSP interface for sessions

qinq.description: Set outer VLAN ethertype to QinQ (0x88a8)

tun.description: Create dedicated TUN interface for each session

qinq.description: Set outer VLAN ethertype to QinQ (0x88a8)

tx-cpuset.description: Pin TX threads to CPU cores (cpuset)

rx-cpuset.description: Pin RX threads to CPU cores (cpuset)

io-slots-tx.description: Overwrite the TX IO slots (ring size)

io-slots-rx.description: Overwrite the RX IO slots (ring size)

qdisc-bypass.description: Overwrite the kernel’s qdisc layer configuration

tx-interval.description: Overwrite the TX polling interval in milliseconds

rx-interval.description: Overwrite the RX polling interval in milliseconds

tx-threads.description: Overwrite the number of TX threads per interface link

rx-threads.description: Overwrite the number of RX threads per interface link

pps.description: Stream traffic rate in packets per second

bps.description: Stream traffic rate in bits per second (layer 3)

pps-upstream.description: Overwrite PPS in upstream for bidirectional streams

bps-upstream.description: Overwrite bps in upstream for bidirectional streams

a10nsp-interface.description: Select corresponding A10NSP interface for stream

network-interface.description: Select corresponding network interface for stream

max-packets.description: Send N packets and stop (0 = infinity)

start-delay.description: Wait N seconds after session established before starting

purge.description: Automatically purge all external LSP during teardown

start-traffic.description: Start traffic after RAW update finished

results.description: Request count to track results for
